claims.text: What is claimed is: 1. The compound 2-(2-amino-1,6-dihydro-6-oxo-purin-9-yl)methoxy-3-hydroxy-1-propanyl-L-valinate hydrochloride in crystalline form. 2. An antiviral pharmaceutical composition compri...

use_codes.desc: PREVENTION OF CMV DISEASE IN KIDNEY, HEART, AND KIDNEY-PANCREAS TRANSPLANT PATIENTS AT HIGH RISK (DONOR CMV SEROPOSITIVE/RECIPIENT CMV SERONEGATIVE)

indications.text:
1.1 Adult Patients
Treatment of Cytomegalovirus (CMV) Retinitis: Valcyte tablets are indicated for the treatment of CMV
retinitis in patients with acquired immunodeficiency syndrome (AIDS) [see Clinical Studies (14.1)].
Prevention of CMV Disease: Valcyte tablets are indicated for the prevention of C...
